text.div:
This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-brachytherapy-permanent-seeds-technique-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-brachytherapy-low-dose-rate-temporary-technique-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-brachytherapy-pulsed-dose-rate-technique-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-brachytherapy-high-dose-rate-technique-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-brachytherapy-high-dose-rate-electronic-technique-vs
  • Import all the codes that are contained in http://hl7.org/fhir/us/mcode/ValueSet/mcode-brachytherapy-radiopharmaceutical-technique-vs

name: BrachytherapyTechniqueVS
title: Brachytherapy Technique Value Set
description: Codes describing the techniques of brachytherapy (internal or surface radiation) procedures.
copyright: This value set includes content from SNOMED CT, which is copyright © 2002+ International Health Terminology Standards Development Organisation (IHTSDO), and distributed by agreement between IHTSDO and HL7. Implementer use of SNOMED CT is not covered by this agreement
